title: Structured Concurrency in Action
summary: A deep-dive into the structured concurrency API as it is currently proposed
content:
A deep-dive into the structured concurrency API as it is currently proposed

In Java 25, the structured concurrency API saw its fifth preview with considerable changes over previous iterations. Java 26 and 27 made only small tweaks and with chances being good that it will finalize without a further overhaul, let's put it into action and explore how to:

  • structure concurrent code
  • process and propagate errors and cancellation
  • customize its behavior
  • observe and benefit from thread relationships

After this presentation you'll be ready to put the structured concurrency API into action in your project.
